creator: a134qaed@gmail.com
text:
On 1/26/09, tabthorpe@freebsd.org <tabthorpe@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Synopsis: Update net-im/openfire to 3.6.3
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: tabthorpe

> State-Changed-Why:
> Ask for submitter fix.
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=130607
>

I'm not sure why it's only coming up on your tb on 8-CURRENT, it
should come up on all versions. I have a question, is dirrmtry ok to
use on a symlink? Only the link needs to be destroyed, as the target
stores the config files. I'm not sure the proper way to add them to
the plist.
